skills.name: AI Safety & Model Behavior
skills.description: Self-directed adversarial testing across chat, image, agentic tool-use and indirect prompt-injection challenges, with conservative interpretation of platform-reported outcomes.

skills.name: Research, Editorial & Community Operations
skills.description: Scientific editorial support, public writing, evidence-synthesis preparation, research facilitation, community-facing protocols and technical publishing operations.

skills.name: Knowledge Integrity, Trust & Investigations
skills.description: Source provenance, public-record research, cross-source corroboration, entity reconciliation, rights context and evidence-bound investigative reporting.

skills.name: Open Science & Data Quality
skills.description: Scientific evidence verification, structured metadata, provenance, taxonomy and validation workflows across Wikimedia, Wikidata, FAIRsharing, Zenodo and ENA records.

skills.name: Code-Literate Technical Operations
skills.description: Requirements definition, codebase reading and behavior inspection, functional testing, issue diagnosis, deployment operations and AI-assisted implementation workflows; not independent software development.
